title: Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple
tagline: Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple is a Tamil temple located at Thirunedunkulam in the Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Thirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple is a Tamil temple located at Thirunedunkulam in the Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Thirunedungalam. The presiding deity is Shiva, who is locally called Thirunedungalanathar. He is also known as Nithya Sundareswarar.

topPlaces.name: Valavandankottai
topPlaces.description: Valavandankottai is a neighbourhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in the outskirts of the city near NIT Trichy in Thuvakudi.

topPlaces.name: Kadayakudi
topPlaces.description: Kadayakudi is a village in the Arimalamrevenue block of Pudukkottai district , Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Thuvakudi
topPlaces.description: Thuvakudi is a town in Tiruchirapalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is an industrial town housing more than 250 industries and is located in the National Highway NH 65 between Tiruchirapalli and Thanjavur.

topPlaces.name: Krishnasamudram
topPlaces.description: Krishnasamudram is a census town in Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Rayamundanpatti
topPlaces.description: Rayamundanpatti is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kadambangudi
topPlaces.description: Kadambangudi is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kailasapuram, Tiruchirapalli
topPlaces.description: Kailasapuram is a Neighborhood of the Tiruchirappalli, located 13 km (8 mi) from Tiruchirapalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It contains the manufacturing and housing of Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) as part of BHEL's 3,000-acre (12 km2) Tiruchirapalli Complex.

topPlaces.name: Nehru Stadium, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium (formerly Khajamalai Stadium) is an stadium located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu. It's the principal venue for the sport of cricket in the city.

items.note: Valavandankottai is a neighbourhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in the outskirts of the city near NIT Trichy in Thuvakudi.
Kadayakudi is a village in the Arimalamrevenue block of Pudukkottai district , Tamil Nadu, India.

Thuvakudi is a town in Tiruchirapalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is an industrial town housing more than 250 industries and is located in the National Highway NH 65 between Tiruchirapalli and Thanjavur.
Krishnasamudram is a census town in Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Rayamundanpatti is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Kadambangudi is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Kailasapuram is a Neighborhood of the Tiruchirappalli, located 13 km (8 mi) from Tiruchirapalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It contains the manufacturing and housing of Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) as part of BHEL's 3,000-acre (12 km2) Tiruchirapalli Complex.
Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium (formerly Khajamalai Stadium) is an stadium located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu. It's the principal venue for the sport of cricket in the city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirunedunkulam Nedungalanathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Valavandankottai, Kadayakudi, Thuvakudi, Krishnasamudram, Rayamundanpatti.
